message:
feat: tabbed AI Agents dashboard, component-only card support, wider dropdowns (#3475)

- Swap tab order: Kagenti first, Kagent second
- Fix "Unknown card type" for component-only cards (kagent/kagenti) by
  falling back to CardWrapper + getCardComponent in DashboardGrid
- Use inline gridColumn instead of dynamic Tailwind col-span-* classes
  that JIT can't detect
- Hide "No cards configured" empty state when dashboard uses tabs
- Add kagent/kagenti to AgentProvider type and AgentSelector dropdown
- Widen AgentStatusIndicator and AgentSelector dropdowns (w-72 → w-96)
- Add kagent card project tags for visibility

Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

   kagenti_topology: ['kubestellar', 'kagenti'],
+  // Kagent CRD cards (component-only, shared with kagent project)
+  kagent_status: ['kubestellar', 'kagent'],
+  kagent_agent_fleet: ['kubestellar', 'kagent'],
+  kagent_tool_registry: ['kubestellar', 'kagent'],
+  kagent_model_providers: ['kubestellar', 'kagent'],
+  kagent_agent_discovery: ['kubestellar', 'kagent'],
+  kagent_security: ['kubestellar', 'kagent'],
+  kagent_topology: ['kubestellar', 'kagent'],
 }
